content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 The Careside: Inside Sales Team Leader Anywhere in the World 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇲🇾 Malaysia, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇹🇭 Thailand, 🇹🇼 Taiwan, Province of China, and 🇻🇳 Viet Nam Western Australia Sales Management and Sales Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5485/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Perth, Australia <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.thecareside.com.au/">https://www.thecareside.com.au/</a> </p> <p>As our Inside Sales Team Leader, you will lead the team responsible for converting inbound enquiries into qualified appointments for our field sales team. Your work will directly impact new client growth, sales performance, and our geographic expansion across Australia.</p> <p>You will manage an established team of 6–8 inside sales representatives based in the Philippines. The team follows up with inbound enquiries, qualifies prospective clients, and schedules phone consultations or in-home visits with our field sales team. Success in this role is measured by the number of appointments booked and downstream sales conversions.</p> <p>The ideal candidate has experience leading inside sales, SDR, appointment-setting, telemarketing, or call centre teams in a performance-driven environment. This role is best suited to candidates based in Southeast Asia who have experience leading Philippines-based teams and working with companies based in Australia, the United States, or the United Kingdom. Experience living or working as an expatriate is highly desirable. Candidates must be able to work during Australian business hours.</p> <h2>Your Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Develop, train, and coach inside sales representatives</p> </li> <li> <p>Conduct regular one-on-one coaching sessions, performance reviews, and sales training sessions</p> </li> <li> <p>Monitor and improve key performance indicators, including lead response times, appointment booking rates, and sales conversions</p> </li> <li> <p>Collaborate with marketing and field sales teams to improve handoffs</p> </li> <li> <p>Become an expert in Australia’s aged care system, home care funding, and The CareSide’s service offering so you can effectively coach the team and improve sales</p> </li> </ul> <h2>Your Background</h2> <ul> <li> <p>2+ years of experience managing sales, SDR, BDR, or call centre teams</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience coaching sales representatives using KPIs and performance metrics</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience managing remote teams</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong understanding of consultative selling and buyer psychology</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent verbal and written communication skills</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to analyse data, identify bottlenecks, and improve processes</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-careside-inside-sales-team-leader">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-careside-inside-sales-team-leader</a></p> Wed, 10 Jun 2026 02:22:59 +0000 appassionati di sviluppo di Web App </strong><strong><br></strong></p> <p>Ti appassiona <strong>costruire web app di qualità amate dagli utenti?</strong> Vuoi avere un impatto concreto sul prodotto e Sei nel posto giusto.</p> <p></p> <p><strong>🚀 Chi siamo</strong></p> <p><a href="http://www.fatturaelettronica-app.it/">FatturaElettronica APP</a> <strong>è il SaaS che semplifica la fatturazione elettronica per aziende e professionisti in Italia.</strong></p> <p> La nostra mission? Convincere e aiutare le imprese italiane a digitalizzarsi.</p> <p>Siamo un team <strong>100% remoto</strong>, composto da circa 25 persone<strong> </strong>distribuite tra Italia ed Europa. </p> <p>Oltre <strong>70.000 clienti</strong> usano già il nostro software ma vogliamo crescere ancora e <strong>creare insieme il miglior software di fatturazione elettronica in Italia.</strong></p> <p><strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong>🎯 Chi stiamo cercando</strong><strong></strong><strong><br></strong></p> <ol><li><strong>Esperienza in PHP, Mysql, </strong><strong>Cakephp, </strong><strong>jQuery, React, Vue, Angular</strong></li><li><strong>Esperienza nello sviluppo di Web App SaaS moderne, usate da molti utenti<br></strong></li><li>Uso abituale di AI-assisted tools (es Cursor, GitHub Copilot)</li><li>Esperienza nella scrittura di unit-test.</li><li>Conoscenza ottima di Italiano e Inglese</li><li>Qualcuno che ami sentirsi parte di un team piccolo e dinamico</li></ol> <p></p> <p>🔹 <strong>Cosa farai</strong></p> <p>Svilupperai<strong> nuove feature</strong> per FatturaElettronica APP, sia nel backend che nel frontend, basandoti sulle UX/UI in Figma , curando <strong>test e qualità del codice</strong> fino al <strong>deploy</strong>.</p> <p>Inoltre, poiché miglioriamo continuamente l’app grazie ai suggerimenti dei nostri clienti, <strong>ti occuperai di collaborare con il team</strong> del customer care per comunicargli le novità dell’app e raccogliere le loro opinioni.<br><strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong><strong>🎁 Cosa offriamo</strong></strong></p> <ol><li><strong>Lavoro 100% remote working</strong></li><li>Contratto iniziale di 12 mesi con possibilità di stabilizzazione </li><li><strong>RAL €30.000 - 50.000</strong></li><li>Buoni pasto €140 al mese (in base ai giorni lavorati)</li><li><strong>Welfare aziendale</strong> con card virtuali spendibili su e-commerce, viaggi, acquisti e molto altro (dall'anno successivo a quello di assunzione)</li><li>Possibilità di partecipare a <strong>conferenze in Europa </strong>(Web Summit a Londra, W
